title: Space Between Knowing
description: A reflective exploration of thoughts, uncertainty, and outcomes we don't fully control. It challenges the belief that mindset guarantees results and suggests peace comes from changing our relationship to chance.

title: The Quiet Asterisk
description: A meditation on probability and everyday resilience. Through human stories, it reframes uncertainty as something to live with—rather than conquer.

title: AI Unleashed: An Executive's Roadmap to Unleashing Innovation
description: Artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) are important emerging technologies that have the potential to transform organizations through improved customer service, streamlined operations, and the realization of new business models. To unlock this potential, leaders and frontline managers have to collaborate with data scientists while being responsible for the strategic directions. This primer for executives will provide a high-level introduction to AI including a simple framework for building a business case and planning for effective implementation of AI within your organization.
link: downloads/AI Unleashed - An Executive’s Roadmap to Unleashing Innovation.pdf

title: Understanding AI and Digital Technology: An Introduction
description: In Understanding AI and Digital Technology, you'll discover how everyday innovations—from the smartphone in your pocket to the algorithms shaping your online experience—are part of a much bigger transformation. This introductory book takes you on a fascinating journey through the evolution of computing, the rise of AI, and the possibilities of quantum computing that lie just over the horizon.

title: Cloud Computing – An Introduction
description: Cloud is the next wave in technology evolution. Instead of purchasing expensive hardware and software and struggling with installation and maintenance, businesses big and small can leverage cloud for all their computing needs. This book provides a quick introduction to cloud and helps with a framework that you can use to make the cloud transition smooth and painless.

title: Tableau - An Introduction
description: Data analysis is fun and easy with Tableau. This introductory book will let you harness the power of Tableau. It will help you get comfortable finding your way around the software, connect to various data sources, and create analyses, visualizations, and dashboards to share throughout your organization.

title: Big Data - An Introduction
description: This book provides a quick introduction to Big Data. Big Data is a phrase that has been bubbling up from the high performance computing niche of the technology market. Increasingly suppliers and vendors have begun to flog Big Data in their presentations. What, exactly, does this phrase mean? What are the available technologies?
